name: soc-training-simulator
description: Multi-role Security Operations Center training simulator with realistic simulated logs for hands-on cybersecurity education
author: Abdullah Al Hussein

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.video:render: npx remotion render video/src/index.ts SOCDemo demo-remotion.mp4 --public-dir video/public
scripts.demo:render:admin: npx remotion render video/src/index.ts SOCAdmin demo-admin.mp4 --public-dir video/public
scripts.demo:render:trainer: npx remotion render video/src/index.ts SOCTrainer demo-trainer.mp4 --public-dir video/public
scripts.demo:render:trainee: npx remotion render video/src/index.ts SOCTrainee demo-trainee.mp4 --public-dir video/public
scripts.demo:render: npx remotion render video/src/index.ts SOCDemoV2 demo-v2.mp4 --public-dir video/public
scripts.demo:all: npm run demo:record && npm run demo:collect && npm run demo:render
